suite.label: Iop element matrix 11/6/0 and 12/6/0 budget tier 4 exo allow
suite.assumption: Supported Iop 11/6/0 and 12/6/0 element profiles should return at least one build under the fresh-query threshold.

profile.label: Iop element matrix 11/6/0 budget tier 4 exo allow
profile.assumption: All supported Iop elements should return at least one build for this bounded profile.

profile.label: Iop element matrix 12/6/0 budget tier 4 exo allow
profile.assumption: All supported Iop elements should return at least one build for this bounded profile.
